name: 100 Lives
description: Gives you extra lives instead of instant death. A lives counter is shown during gameplay.

lives-count.name: Number of Lives
lives-count.description: How many lives you get per attempt

invincibility-time.name: Invincibility Time
invincibility-time.description: Seconds of invincibility after each hit

rescue-key.name: Rescue Key
rescue-key.description: Teleport player to last safe position

fly-toggle-key.name: Cycle Game Mode
fly-toggle-key.description: Cycle: Cube > Ship > Wave > UFO > Swing
